findings.description: RST cross-reference syntax `:ref:`実行時ID<execution_id>`` is preserved verbatim in the Markdown content of the knowledge file. This RST-specific markup has no meaning outside of Sphinx and may appear as raw noise to an AI consumer. The plain text 「実行時ID」 conveys the same meaning without the markup.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `読み込まれたデータに対する :ref:`実行時ID<execution_id>` を採番し` — the RST directive is a navigation artifact that should be stripped in the knowledge file transformation.
